drl:
rule "R0"
salience -10
agenda-group "ga"
when
    (or T1(f0 <= 3.5, f1 != 2, $b0_0_0 : f2, $b0_0_1 : f3) T1(f0 <= 3.5, f1 != 2, $b0_0_0 : f2, $b0_0_1 : f3))
then
end
rule "R1"
when
    T1($b1_0_0 : f1, $b1_0_1 : f3)
    $p1_1 : T1(f1 <= -1000000007, f1 > $b1_0_0, $b1_1_0 : f1, $b1_1_1 : f3)
then
    delete($p1_1);
end
rule "R2"
agenda-group "ga"
when
    $p2_0 : T0($b2_0_0 : f2)
then
    insert(new T1($p2_0.getF1(), $p2_0.getF1(), $p2_0.isF2(), $p2_0.isF2()));
    insert(new T1(3.5, $p2_0.getF1(), $p2_0.isF2(), true));
end
rule "R3"
salience -3
no-loop
when
    T1($b3_0_0 : f3)
    T1()
then
    drools.setFocus("ga");
end
rule "R4"
salience 4
no-loop
when
    T1(f0 == 3.5 || f1 > 100, $b4_0_0 : f3)
    T1(f2 == true, f1 not in (12), $b4_1_0 : f3)
then
end
name: fz_5150_1857
_finding: D-258 fresh-seed population find (seed 5150 x 2000): binding divergence on firing[26] - R3's tuple picks different T1 facts (engine f0=-2/f2=false vs oracle f0=-1/f2=true as first pattern). Reproduces BYTE-IDENTICALLY on pre-port 9c4e23a (worktree bisect) - pre-existing latent, NOT a D-258 regression. Shape-adjacent to the fz_4242_286 binding-divergence family; open for its own triage arc. CRACKED 2026-07-15 (lane 2, D-260): the same-rule sibling-continue skips the eager flush, coalescing per-delta staging for a no-loop self-join receiver. Family + port checklist: probes_pending/binding_divergence/HANDOFF.md.
